title: 'Just married': Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce tie the knot
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have married, with comedian Adam Sandler officiating the ceremony according to a publicist's statement. The union brings together pop music's biggest star and the NFL player, merging the entertainment and sports worlds.
content: Comedian Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony, said the publicist's statement under the headline "Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Are Married!"

zh.title: "刚结婚":泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯喜结连理
zh.summary: 泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯已结婚，据发言人声明，喜剧演员亚当·桑德勒主持了婚礼。这场婚姻将流行音乐巨星和美式足球运动员联系在一起，融合了娱乐和体育世界。

title: Iran begins six-day funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei nearly four months after his death
summary: Iran will hold a six-day funeral ceremony for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, nearly four months after his death, with services spanning both Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad. The extended funeral reflects his significant role in Iranian politics and religion.
content: Iran plans a six-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, with ceremonies across Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad.

zh.title: 伊朗为阿亚图拉·哈梅内伊举行六天葬礼，距其去世已近四个月
zh.summary: 伊朗将为最高领袖阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊举行六天葬礼，这距他去世已近四个月，葬礼仪式将在伊朗和伊拉克进行，最后在马什哈德下葬。这次长期葬礼反映了他在伊朗政治和宗教中的重要角色。

title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
summary: A federal prosecutor is seeking a reduced prison sentence for James Patten, one of three defendants in a stock manipulation scheme involving Hometown International, a company that operated a single New Jersey deli. The request involves undisclosed reasons, drawing attention to potential insider trading tactics. This case highlights how market fraud can involve unusual vehicles like a small, single-location business.
content: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.

zh.title: 美国联邦政府为新泽西州1亿美元熟食店欺诈犯寻求减刑——但部分原因隐而未宣
zh.summary: 联邦检察官正为詹姆斯·帕滕寻求减刑，他是涉及家乡国际公司（一家经营单一新泽西州熟食店的公司）股票操纵计划的三名被告之一。该请求涉及未公开的原因，引发了对潜在内幕交易策略的关注。这个案例突出了市场欺诈如何可能涉及小型单一地点企业等不同寻常的手段。
